title: Need to be able to see item description on the mobile app!
excerpt:
My team and I use the item description section to add all the important info about an item. We’re a marketing team and have 50+ items ongoing at one time. 
I have a crucial issue at the moment whereas from the mobile app…

posts.author: KateR1996 (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
My team and I use the item description section to add all the important info about an item. We’re a marketing team and have 50+ items ongoing at one time.

I have a crucial issue at the moment whereas from the mobile app I can’t view the item descriptions! This is an absoltute nightmare as a manager of a team! When i’m at an event or away from the laptop, I can’t see ANY important details at all and it’s the only place to add long-form info really as we keep updates for dissussions.

posts.author: jure (Jure)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, we have the same problem. Was there any progres in this direction?

posts.author: chobed (Obed)
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you find a solution?
Me and my team are writing details for every task on the “item description” but then it can´tbe seen on mobile app

posts.author: wouter.galia (Wouter)
posts.cookedHtml: Same very annoying issue, still not fixed? It only works sometimes…

posts.author: CaitlinEpperson (Caitlin Epperson)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed—this seems to be a very easy-to-implement request, since you can view Monday Docs attatched to a Files Column, so why not the item description, which is much cleaner? This needs to be accessible on the mobile app.
